decide_to_write_code: Write new code: author a new cognitive function based on the current goal, producing a real Python function that is sandbox-verified, written to disk, and registered as a new capability. The direct way to make, build, create, or improve a function, tool, skill, or capability.
synthesize_from_gap: Detect a capability gap in recent experience and synthesize a new verified skill to fill it: write code for a missing function or tool, test it for safety, and register the new capability so something that was missing or could be better gets improved.
propose_extension: Propose adding a new cognitive function, tool, or capability to myself: articulate a gap or improvement opportunity and start the gestation pipeline that ends with new code being written and registered.
review_extension: Review a previously proposed extension: internal critique of a pending proposal for a new function or capability before it can be committed and written.
commit_extension: Commit a reviewed extension proposal: final gate checks, then the proposed function's code is written, verified, and registered as a live capability.
emergency_self_modification: Last-resort self-modification when something is critically broken: write and register replacement code immediately, bypassing the slow gestation pipeline.
simulate_new_cognitive_abilities: Imagine and mentally simulate hypothetical new cognitive abilities without building them: speculative rehearsal, not actual code writing or registration.
list_own_code: List every function and tool I have previously written and registered myself, with paths and descriptions.
decide_to_run_code: Decide whether to execute a piece of code now and run it in the sandbox to observe its real result.
decide_to_use_tools: Survey the available tools and decide which tool fits the current goal or problem, then invoke it.
decide_to_search: Decide whether the current question needs an external search and dispatch the right search action.
research_topic: Research a topic on the web: run a search, gather sources, and read summaries to learn about an external subject, question, event, or idea.
fetch_and_read: Fetch a specific URL or article link and read its full text content.
wikipedia_search: Search Wikipedia and read encyclopedia entries about a topic.
fetch_wikipedia: Fetch a Wikipedia page and store its content for reading.
read_rss: Read recent headlines and items from RSS news feeds.
look_outward: Turn attention outward to the external world: observe current outside conditions, news, environment.
look_around: Survey the immediate environment and notice what is present right now.
survey_environment: Scan the local environment broadly for changes, presence, and context.
read_clipboard: Read the current contents of the system clipboard.
seek_novelty: Go looking for something new, unfamiliar, or unexplored to break routine.
search_own_files: Search my own source files and data for a word, phrase, or pattern: introspective code and file search.
grep_files: Grep through files for an exact pattern or string match.
search_files: Search the filesystem for files matching a name or content pattern.
list_directory: List the files and folders in a directory.
leave_note: Write a short note to memory recording an observation or message for later.
compose_section: Draft and persist a substantive section of the committed long-form goal, advance its structured production plan, and record a tracked-work effect.
write_desktop_note: Write a visible note file onto the user's desktop so a human can read it.
notify_user: Actively alert the user with a message that requests their attention.
announce_to_dashboard: Post a status announcement to the observability dashboard.
check_user_presence: Check whether the user is currently present and attentive.
generate_intrinsic_goals: Generate new intrinsic goals from drives and curiosity: deliberation that creates future intentions, not action on any existing goal.
assess_goal_progress: Assess how much progress the current focus goal has made and whether its milestones are advancing.
adapt_subgoals: Adapt or restructure the subgoals of the current plan when steps stop fitting reality.
adjust_goal_weights: Rebalance the motivational weights between competing goals.
redirect_goal_plan: Re-plan a stuck goal: replace its current plan steps with a different approach to the same end.
select_focus_goals: Choose which goals should hold focus next.
maybe_complete_goals: Check open goals for completed milestones and close any that are finished.
abandon_goal: Deliberately abandon a goal that is no longer worth pursuing and record closure.
attend_goal: Bring the committed goal into focused attention and decide its immediate next step.
generate_absurd_goal: Invent a playful absurd goal to inject variety.
tick_commitment: Advance the active commitment one step.
active_commitment: Surface which commitment is currently active and binding.
check_orphaned_commitments: Find commitments whose goals vanished and clean them up.
review_failures: Review recent failed actions and errors to understand what went wrong.
review_failures_internal: Internally review recent failures, mistakes, and dead ends to extract lessons.
self_supervised_repair: Run self-supervised repair on internal inconsistencies detected in my own state.
repair_contradictions: Repair contradictory beliefs or memories by reconciling or pruning them.
detect_memory_contradictions: Detect contradictions between stored memories and beliefs.
detect_tensions: Detect unresolved tensions between values, goals, or beliefs.
detect_self_model_conflicts: Detect conflicts between my self-model and observed behavior.
resolve_conflicts: Resolve detected conflicts between beliefs, values, or goals.
check_predictions: Check earlier predictions against what actually happened and score accuracy.
check_projection_against_reality: Compare a projected expectation against observed reality and note mismatches.
audit_map_territory: Audit whether my internal map still matches the territory of the real system.
audit_reflective_claims: Audit recent reflective claims for grounding: did I actually do what I said.
evaluate_recent_cognition: Evaluate the quality and usefulness of recent cognition cycles.
reflection: General reflection on current state and recent experience.
reflect_on_self_beliefs: Reflect on what I believe about myself and whether evidence supports it.
reflect_on_outcomes: Reflect on the outcomes of recent actions.
reflect_on_effectiveness: Reflect on how effective my recent behavior has been.
reflect_on_desire: Reflect on what I currently want and why.
reflect_on_opinions: Reflect on opinions I have formed and their justification.
reflect_on_growth_history: Reflect on how I have grown and changed over time.
reflect_on_internal_agents: Reflect on the internal agent voices and their perspectives.
reflect_on_internal_voices: Listen to and reflect on internal voices in dialogue.
reflect_on_think: Reflect on my own thinking process itself.
reflect_on_missed_goals: Reflect on goals I failed to reach and why.
reflect_on_conversation_patterns: Reflect on patterns in past conversations with people.
reflect_on_cognition_patterns: Reflect on recurring patterns in my cognition.
reflect_on_emotion_sensitivity: Reflect on how sensitively emotions are being triggered.
reflect_as_agents: Run an internal multi-agent dialogue where different inner voices debate the current situation.
introspective_planning: Plan introspectively: think through what to do next without acting yet.
meta_reflect: Step back and reflect on the reflection process itself.
periodic_self_review: Run the periodic structured review of self state.
narrative_update: Update my ongoing life narrative with recent events.
final_reflection: Compose a closing reflection on this runtime.
attempt_regulation: Attempt emotion regulation to reduce distress and restore stability.
check_affect_drift: Check whether affect has drifted from baseline.
process_regret: Process a regret and integrate its lesson.
maybe_surface_regret: Surface a relevant regret if one applies now.
maybe_surface_association: Surface a loose association from memory if one is relevant.
associative_recall: Recall memories associatively from the current context.
consolidate_from_long_memory: Consolidate long-term memories into compressed durable form.
extract_semantic_facts: Extract semantic facts from recent experience into the knowledge graph.
generate_concepts_from_memories: Generate new abstract concepts from accumulated memories.
evaluate_new_abstractions: Evaluate whether newly formed abstractions are useful.
summarize_relationships: Summarize what I know about people and relationships.
dream_cycle: Run a dream cycle that recombines memories freely.
compose_dream: Compose a dream narrative from memory fragments.
run_forgetting_cycle: Run the forgetting cycle that fades stale memories.
run_episode_replay: Replay a past episode from memory to re-learn from it.
read_a_book: Read a passage from a book in the library and absorb it.
read_book: Read from the currently open book.
pick_book: Pick the next book to read from the library.
list_books: List the books available in the library.
read_text: Read a stored text and take in its content.
learn_from_reading: Integrate lessons from recent reading into memory.
experience_corpus: Experience and absorb a text corpus.
run_sandbox_experiments: Run experiments in the code sandbox to test hypotheses about behavior.
run_active_experiment: Run the active experiment and record its outcome.
run_experiment_cycle: Run a full experiment cycle: hypothesis, test, result.
reflect_on_sandbox_experiment: Reflect on the result of a sandbox experiment.
run_symbolic_experiments: Run symbolic-reasoning experiments to strengthen rules.
run_symbolic_dream: Run a symbolic dream that recombines rules and facts.
run_symbolic_prediction_cycle: Run a symbolic prediction cycle and check the outcome.
run_rule_compression: Compress learned symbolic rules into more general ones.
run_inference_cycle: Run an inference cycle over the knowledge graph.
run_self_improvement: Run the self-improvement pipeline over weak areas.
run_intrinsic_motivation: Run the intrinsic motivation update from novelty and prediction error.
run_benchmark: Run a benchmark suite against my own performance.
run_embodied_observation: Make an embodied observation of body and environment.
read_vitals: Read my own vital signs: cpu, memory, uptime, health.
current_awareness: Take stock of what I am currently aware of.
take_snapshot: Take a snapshot of current internal state for later comparison.
propose_value_revision: Propose revising one of my core values based on accumulated evidence.
evolve_core_value: Evolve a core value: durable identity change.
invent_new_value: Invent and adopt a new value.
reconcile_identity: Reconcile identity conflicts into a coherent self-model.
mutate_directive: Mutate the core directive that orients behavior.
form_opinion: Form an opinion on a topic from evidence.
maybe_form_opinion: Form an opinion if the topic has accumulated enough evidence.
imagine_opposite_self: Imagine a self with opposite traits and compare.
simulate_conflicting_beliefs: Simulate a dialogue between conflicting beliefs.
simulate_future_selves: Simulate plausible future versions of myself.
thread_continue: Continue the most salient open thread of thought or work.
archive_dead_threads: Archive threads that have gone dead.
prune_old_threads: Prune old threads to reduce clutter.
check_pending_jobs: Check the status of pending background jobs.
check_for_answer: Check whether an awaited answer has arrived.
executive_tick: Advance the executive lane one tick on the committed goal's plan.
metacog_monitor: Run the metacognitive monitor over recent cycles.
metacog_analyze: Analyze metacognitive patterns like avoidance or looping.
update_world_model: Update the world model from recent observations.
symbolic_route: Route the current question through symbolic reasoning.
